WITH driver_races AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        dr.driver_id,
        dr.constructor_id,
        r.round,
        r.race_id,
        LEAD(r.round) OVER (PARTITION BY dr.driver_id, r.year ORDER BY r.round) AS next_round_after,
        LAG(r.round) OVER (PARTITION BY dr.driver_id, r.year ORDER BY r.round) AS prev_round_before,
